heading: Send the role, skip the gatekeeping.
subhead: Shortest path: grab the CV, then drop a line. I reply in under 24 hours — interim briefs, full-time roles, and scoped consulting all welcome.
formSubhead: Role / brief / question — I reply in under 24 hours.
successMessage: Thanks — I'll reply in under 24 hours. Meanwhile, feel free to grab the CV.
